query:
ALTER TABLE intakeSessions
  ADD COLUMN paymentAmount INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN paymentStatus ENUM('pending','shown','confirmed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  ADD COLUMN paymentShownAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN paymentConfirmedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
